meaning: n.顶针,心环,嵌环,套管,支撑环
examples: Now shall I give you a thimble?
"Oh dear," said the nice Wendy, "I don't mean a kiss, I mean a thimble."
The eight tokens are an iron, racecar, Scottie dog, a shoe, thimble, top hat, wheelbarrow and battleship.
The Piazza della Signoria was a riot of sun-pinked Russians, American students, and cops in white thimble-shaped helmets.
